Brigandine Tunic  
 


Slot: CHEST
AC: 17
STR: +7 STA: +4 ENDUR: +10
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Cheap now
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2004 at 9:02 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592265665548
19 posts
Since most these posts are a year old I'll post something more recent. This bp is dirt cheap now, at least on my server. I bought one for 100pp for my lvl 21 sk. Though I perfer the plate look for my dark elf, stats are more important.
▲ Page top
Advice Plz!
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2003 at 11:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591782515886
1 post
Which BP is better for a level 30 warrior? This BP or a Mitheral BP. On the Tribunal server the mitheral is 300 pp more. I already own one of these but was saving up for the mitheral BP. Should i get the mitheral or save the pp?


Elcor Wyyrmbane
The Tribunal Server
▲ Page top
RE: Advice Plz!
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2003 at 12:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Neither one.

get either a crafted, or crusty BP or a treeweave. Also, depending on your finances and race, check into either the OLD cultural armors, or acrylia plate.
▲ Page top
better than ry`gorr
QuoteReply
# Dec 06 2002 at 9:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784347494
114 posts
i saw some of these for 200-100pp in the bazaar...sweet item. its better that gorr cause its 1 less ac (big deal) 3less stregnth (got 120 lvl 19)and some stamimina which is like 5hp right now. i like it.

i had 123 but new equip changed it

#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 06 2002 at 7:10 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) my 27th level warrior wears FP armor and says no way to the FP BP becuz this rocks! i wish there were other pieces to go with...like the other post said, you can look good but i will be alive laughin at your corpse..hehe...get this piece of armor, wear it, love it, live to tell tale.
RE: Vanity schmanity...
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2002 at 3:34 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775793727
12 posts
Buddy , If Yer A WAR Screaw this BP and go with EB BP (25AC) or Crafted (ac22 +5sta +25HP) Both Are Way Better For You ... And Sell That FP and Get as Much Crafted As you Can Cept For Pants and Helm go For Crusty Legs (for 16sta) and SSB 35hps 10magic you'll only lose 2or 3 ac compared to crafted

143 posts

▲ Page top
Looing like a little Bear
QuoteReply
# Oct 18 2001 at 5:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251423748
4 posts
I was running around in NoRo and someone basicly dropped this in my lap. Wow. I got it when I was only 12th Level. Still have it on at 18th, and haven't found anything better yet. I look like a little teddy bear running around with it on and the rest of my outfit. I saw ***** fasion. What good is it? You'll have a better looking corpse? Wow. I'll be laughing when I run across your dead *** looking fashionable lying there on the ground, while my Bear outfit is keeping me alive!!

Ondee the Alcoholic Dwarven Paladin
▲ Page top
Yay =)
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2001 at 11:26 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762563698
41 posts
I was grouping in DL today, when the shammy in my group asked if anyone needed this tunic..Noone said they needed it, but I said "Well, my shammy (a lowbie) would love it! But I didnt bring any cash with me, sorry.." Then he just handed it over to me and said it was free =) He also gave me a pair of wiz+3 earrings and some giant scalemail gaunts also for my shaman =) He made my day!

-

Zenofex Stormcaller,
Ranger on Erollisi Marr

"Therefore it can be said that victorious warriors win first, and then go to battle, while defeated warriors go to battle first, and then seek to win." - Sun Tzu, the Art of War
▲ Page top
Doh!
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2001 at 4:06 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Bought it cause I like the stats....better then my Charred Guardian Breastplate...but it looks like BANDED ARMOR..and I was wearing all black.

So regardless of the stats...I put in the bank while I torture myself wondering which is more important to me...style or substance.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 16 2001 at 11:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I was like a LvL 16 Warrior, and I had just learned every language in the game. On Lanys T'vyl at least, it was a very cheap to learn skill as far as money goes (At least for non-humans, and if you play your cards right :) ), and very profitable. Well, I was just wondering around in East Commonlands, selling my skill for different prices for different languages, and this LvL 24 twinked Wood Elf Warrior sends me a tell. He said he wanted to learn everything I knew, with the exception of his normal skill in language. I said to him "Sure, gimme a sec to add up the total" It came out to be about 450pp. That may seem like a high price, but I was pulling people in for way more than that if they offered. Anyway, he told me to meet him in North Freeport cause he had to offload some stuff, and get the cash. Well, I taught him everything til' he was fluent in every language. He stands up and hands me like 150pp. At first I was furious for trusting him in teaching him these languages and getting ripped off. But then I saw a Tunic in the trade window. Then a sword. I thought, oh yay, a banded tunic which I am wearing one of the same type, and a 2HS sword. I inspected the first Item, the tunic, and I saw the stats before the name. Brigandine Tunic. This was great, and it matched perfectly was I allready had on. The sword I figured would just be Bronze or something. But no. It was something I had heard of, and thought it was such item, but had never actually seen it. It's name read Langseax of the Wolves. At the time, including the Platinum, this was a total value of about 1.8K pp. I was exstatic, and wore the Tunic and sold the Sword for about 300pp. This was at the dawn of Kunark, so things were of decent value from the orginal continents still. This is however a sad story. At Lvl 18, I died in Kithicor Forest by a run away gang of undead. I never got that stuff back. Un-twinked at LvL 18 and worth 3K. ( Swear to god, I'm got so lucky on that char.) I tried to teach Language again for the money to replace that stuff. But EQ put in some bug that made it take a ton longer to teach at that time. **** YOU EQ FOR ******** MY PERFECT PLAN!!!
RE: Awesome deal!!
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2002 at 6:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252000436
View User Forum
169 posts
hate to chide you on your loss so long ago . ..
but why didnt you just get a necromancer, shadowknight or bard to locate the corpse for ya? in the daytime when the undead arent out, loot it yourself or get them to drag it to you.

such a waste!

Brig Tunic
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 7:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761641954
2 posts
Well, I bought this from a low lvl elf in Kelethin for 100pp. But hey, I am talking about someone who was selling Ivy Etched Tunic for 200pp :) If I hadnt been poor at the time I would have bought both! Either way I traded it for 150 plus a stiletto of the blood claw....(I am wearing Sarnak Emblazened Tabard) now but ah well, needed the mula!~

24th Ranger Karrina ShadowStalker of Fennin RO (non twink)

ALTS: Karria a 7th Major Twink Druid
Starnote: 10th Bard (Some what twink)

Best Present Ever
QuoteReply
# May 15 2001 at 4:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756986172
1 post
I was sitting in NFP looking to pick up a Crafted Breast Plate to replace the ***** bronze I was wearing and a 52nd lvl ranger just came up and handed this to me. Made my night.
▲ Page top
RE: Best Present Ever
QuoteReply
# May 27 2001 at 9:03 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yep, this is a sweet piece of armor. If it didn't look utterly stupid on a Half Elf female in mostly crafted (pink and white does not mix well with shiny blue), I'd use it on her. Decided on a MithBP instead. For classes who wear chain on a regular basis though (I'm talking to you, Rangers and Rogues :) ), this is probably about as good as it gets for quite a while.

You can buy them for insane prices.. see at least one for 300pp each day in EC, though you can easily sell them at 500pp.
▲ Page top
nice
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 8:42 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
as a 30 warrior I can get the money for this thing without too much trouble, and compaired to a rygorr bp, 18 ac, 10 str, and some mana and poison, which goes for like 1k, this is a good buy with only 1 less ac 3 less str but 4 sta. one question, is this thing for sale a lot in the commons? Next one I see I'm buying

it still is a GOD piec of armor for cheap
